title: Execution History + Replay

features.executionHistoryList: Filterable, paginated list of past executions with status badges, duration, step counts
features.filters: Filter by status (success/failed/cancelled/running/timeout/needs_input), task type, search query
features.statsCards: Overview stats: total executions, success rate, avg duration, successful count
features.detailDialog: Full execution detail with 4 tabs: Overview, Timeline, Replay, Export
features.timeline: Step-by-step timeline with tool names, reasoning, parameters, results, errors, screenshots
features.browserbaseReplay: Link to BrowserBase replay URL, embedded iframe, direct recording link, debug URL
features.exportReport: Downloadable HTML report with execution summary, step timeline, error details (printable to PDF)

notes: Uses existing taskExecutions and agencyTasks schema from schema-webhooks.ts. Router uses protectedProcedure for auth. rrweb is in dependencies but BrowserBase replay via iframe/link is the primary approach since rrweb data is not stored in the DB.
